intro_message: Hey everyone — Vamsi Reddy here. Senior Crypto Accountant, based in India, open to remote opportunities globally.I didn't start in crypto. I started my career in 2011, the old-fashioned way — processing invoices at EXL, then audit at KPMG, then finance ops across a few fast-moving companies like Consero (CGS). Solid, traditional, unglamorous.Then in 2022, I joined Polygon Labs.And everything I thought I knew about accounting got stress-tested. No software handled what we were doing. No playbook existed. You had to reconcile multi-sig wallets against chain explorers manually, classify staking rewards and bridge transactions in real time, and build internal controls for assets that moved while you slept.I loved it.Since then, I've built out crypto accounting functions for:• Polygon Labs — daily digital asset accounting across Ethereum, Polygon & Gnosis treasury wallets  • KPK Foundation — 50+ wallets, 6,000+ monthly transactions, full AP/subledger ownership • Modex — end-to-end crypto + fiat accounting, GL, audits, and leadership reportingWhat excites me right now is the same thing that's probably on everyone's radar here — how do you build accounting infrastructure for assets that traditional ERPs were never designed to handle? That's the problem I want to keep solving.I'm currently looking for my next opportunity — ideally with a team that's serious about getting their financial operations right, not just "good enough."If you're a CFO, Finance Lead, Accountant or building a Web3 finance team — I'd love to connect. Always happy to talk Defi, treasury, reconciliation strategy, or digital asset accounting & AI automation.
